term is very important f.close whenever we open a file it's our duty to close it if you close it then basically you are telling the computer that computer ji I have taken whatever I wanted from this file now you close it like you have a fridge in your house you open the fridge you take out a cold water bottle you drink water you put the bottle inside you close the fridge right? you do right? you have to close f.close too because you close the fridge and you have to close f.close too so that that file does not remain open later if someone or if someone else wants to access that file then they can do it so f.close is a good practice if you don't do f.close then it will work but we should put the habit of f.close why should we put? because once we have accessed the file our work is done so
